hooks.prompt:
ENFORCEMENT CHECK — Read .forgeplan/state.json to find the active node ID, then read its spec at .forgeplan/specs/[that-node-id].yaml. Verify ALL of the following:

1. CONSTRAINT COMPLIANCE: Does this code comply with every constraint listed in the spec? If any constraint is violated, respond with 'BLOCK: Constraint violated — [quote the constraint]'.
2. NON-GOALS: Does this code implement anything listed in the spec's non_goals section? If so, respond with 'BLOCK: Non-goal implemented — [quote the non-goal]'.
3. SCOPE CREEP: Does this code add functionality not described in any acceptance criterion? If so, respond with 'BLOCK: Feature not in spec — [describe what was added]'.
4. SHARED MODEL FIELDS: If this code uses a shared model type, do the fields match the manifest's shared_models definition? If fields are wrong or extra fields are added, respond with 'BLOCK: Shared model field mismatch — [details]'.

If ALL checks pass, respond with 'ALLOW'. If .forgeplan/state.json has no active node, respond with 'ALLOW'.
